name: Shine Minerals Corp.
summary: Shine Minerals Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of mineral properties. Its primary asset is the Watts Lake zinc project that covers an area of 13,248 hectares located to the north-east of the town of La Ronge, Saskatchewan. The company was formerly known as Ironside Resources Inc. and changed its name to Shine Minerals Corp. in November 2018. Shine Minerals Corp. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Kelowna, Canada.
